posts.title: 数据结构第六章
posts.text: 题目序号DC06PE02123456789101112131415#include "allinclude.h"Status is_Desendant(SqBiTree T, int u, int v) { // Add your code here if(v>T.lastIndex || u>T.lastIndex || v<=u || u<1 || v<1) return FALSE;while (v>u) { if (v/2==u) { return TRUE; } v/=2;}return FALSE;} DC06PE111234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829#include "allinclude.h" //DO NOT edit this lineTElemType PreOrderKHelper(BiTree T, int* k){ if(T == NULL || *k <= 0) return '#'; if (--(*k) == 0) return T->data; TElemType left = PreOrderKHelper(T->lchild, k); if (*k == 0) return left; return PreOrderKHelper(T->rchild, k);}TElemType PreOrderK(BiTree T, int k) { return PreOrderKHelper(T, &k);} DC06PE1212345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031\#include "allinclude.h" //DO NOT edit this lineint countLeavesHelper(BiTree T){ if(T==NULL)​ return 0; if(T->lchild==NULL&&T->rchild==NULL) {​ return 1; } int left = countLeavesHelper(T->lchild); int right = countLeavesHelper(T->rchild); return left+right;}int Leaves(BiTree T){ return countLeavesHelper(T);}
